docs/ASE_Assignment.AppCanvas.html.title: Class AppCanvas | ASE_Docs
docs/ASE_Assignment.AppCanvas.html.keywords: Class AppCanvas Namespace ASE_Assignment Assembly ASE_Assignment.dll Initialises drawing surface and provides methods for drawing and also manages the drawing surface. public class AppCanvas : Canvas, ICanvas Inheritance object Canvas AppCanvas Implements ICanvas Inherited Members Canvas.background_colour Canvas.Tri(int, int) Canvas.Rectangle(int, int, bool) Canvas.Reset() Canvas.WriteText(string) Canvas.Xpos Canvas.Ypos object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Constructors AppCanvas(int, int) Initialises an instance of the AppCanvas class using the width and height provided. public AppCanvas(int width, int height) Parameters width int Width of the drawing surface height int Height of the drawing surface Properties PenColour Sets the pen colour used when drawing on the canvas. public override object PenColour { get; set; } Property Value object Methods CheckWithinBounds(int, int) Checks if parameters given are within drawing surface bounds and throws BOOSE.CommandException if not. public void CheckWithinBounds(int x, int y) Parameters x int X position to be checked if within bounds. y int Y position to be checked if within bounds. Exceptions CommandException Thrown if X or Y provided are out of bounds. Circle(int, bool) Draws a circle from the current position with the specified radius, filled or unfilled. public override void Circle(int radius, bool filled) Parameters radius int Radius of the circle drawn filled bool Bool representing if the circle should be filled Clear() Clears the canvas by filling it with the current background colour. public override void Clear() DrawTo(int, int) Draws a line from the current position to the specified (x,y) coordinates and sets the current position to the (x,y) coordinates. public override void DrawTo(int x, int y) Parameters x int X coordinate to draw to y int Y coordinate to draw to MoveTo(int, int) Moves pen position to given (x,y) coordinate. public override void MoveTo(int x, int y) Parameters x int X position to move to. y int Y position to move to. Rect(int, int, bool) Draws a rectangle with the specified width and height, filled or unfilled. public override void Rect(int width, int height, bool filled) Parameters width int Width of the rectangle height int Height of the rectangle filled bool Bool representing if the rectangle should be filled Set(int, int) Initialises then sets the default conditions of the canvas, such as background colour and pen colour. public override void Set(int width, int height) Parameters width int Width of the drawing surface height int Height of the drawing surface SetColour(int, int, int) Sets the pen colour using RGB values. public override void SetColour(int red, int green, int blue) Parameters red int Red value of pen colour green int Green value of pen colour blue int Blue value of pen colour getBitmap() Used to retrieve the bitmap of the AppCanvas drawing surface public override object getBitmap() Returns object Object of the drawing surface

docs/ASE_Assignment.AppCommandFactory.ht.title: Class AppCommandFactory | ASE_Docs
docs/ASE_Assignment.AppCommandFactory.ht.keywords: Class AppCommandFactory Namespace ASE_Assignment Assembly ASE_Assignment.dll Factory class for creating instances of ASE_Assignment and BOOSE commands. BOOSE.CommandFactory public class AppCommandFactory : CommandFactory, ICommandFactory Inheritance object CommandFactory AppCommandFactory Implements ICommandFactory Inherited Members object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) object.ToString() Methods MakeCommand(string) Creates an instance of specified command based on commandType provided. public override ICommand MakeCommand(string commandType) Parameters commandType string String correlating to class constructor to be initialised. If commandType is not recognised BOOSE.CommandFactory is called to determine if the command exists within BOOSE library. Returns ICommand Returns ICommand object corresponding to the commandType See Also ICommand

docs/ASE_Assignment.Circle.html.keywords: Class Circle Namespace ASE_Assignment Assembly ASE_Assignment.dll Command to draw a circle on the canvas. public class Circle : CommandOneParameter, ICommand Inheritance object Command CanvasCommand CommandOneParameter Circle Implements ICommand Inherited Members CommandOneParameter.param1 CommandOneParameter.param1unprocessed CanvasCommand.yPos CanvasCommand.xPos CanvasCommand.canvas CanvasCommand.Canvas Command.program Command.parameterList Command.parameters Command.paramsint Command.Set(StoredProgram, string) Command.Compile() Command.ProcessParameters(string) Command.ToString() Command.Program Command.Name Command.ParameterList Command.Parameters Command.Paramsint object.Equals(object) object.Equals(object, object) object.GetHashCode() object.GetType() object.MemberwiseClone() object.ReferenceEquals(object, object) Constructors Circle() Initialises new instance of Circle with no parameters. public Circle() Circle(Canvas, int) Initialises new instance of Circle with a specified canvas and radius. public Circle(Canvas c, int radius) Parameters c Canvas Canvas that the circle is to be drawn on. radius int The radius of the circle that will be drawn. Methods CheckParameters(string[]) Checks if Circle command has been called with the correct amount of parameters. public override void CheckParameters(string[] parameterList) Parameters parameterList string[] String array to be checked to ensure the correct number of parameters has been passed. Exceptions CommandException Thrown if the number of parameters is not 1. Execute() Calls BOOSE.Command.Execute(), then draws a circle with specified radius. public override void Execute() See Also CommandOneParameter
